title: Local perspective
summary: Joseph Carlough Sr. Joseph Carlough Sr. Photo by Jamey Bradbury. “I’ve been all over Alaska, but this is my home,” says 82-year-old CIRI shareholder Joseph Carlough Sr. of Seldovia. As a commercial fisherman, he fished the Bering Sea out of Adak. He fished Cordova and Chignik. He fished in Kodiak and lived through the tsunam...
